decks.notes: The main focus of this Jeskai Control deck is to control the game through the use of various spells and abilities. With a mix of counter spells, removal, and card draw, the deck aims to outlast opponents and gain advantage through card advantage and board control. By using a combination of efficient removal, card draw, and control effects, the deck seeks to outmaneuver opponents and come out on top in the late game. Additionally, the inclusion of various lands and artifacts helps to ensure the deck can consistently hit its mana requirements and maintain a stable board presence.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent and control the board. The key idea is to efficiently deploy threats like Flamebraider and Ashling, Rekindled, while backing them up with removal spells like Burst Lightning and Sunderflock. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast clock, while utilizing cards like Winternight Stories and Vibrance to maintain card advantage and tempo. By combining aggression with control elements, the deck aims to pressure the opponent and secure victory before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly casting low-cost spells and utilizing cards that interact with instants and sorceries. By maximizing the use of cheap spells and card draw effects, the deck aims to maintain a fast pace and overwhelm opponents with a combination of burn spells and creature damage. The inclusion of bounce and tempo spells like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand help to control the battlefield and disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also allowing for quick aggression to close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up with mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Erode and Escape Tunnel to control the board. The inclusion of unique cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Badgermole Cub add to the theme of the deck, which aims to establish an aggressive board presence and close out games efficiently.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of spells, counters, and efficient creatures. By using cards like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental to control the board, along with cards like Prismari Charm and Opt to draw cards and maintain advantage, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through attrition. Traumatic Critique and Impractical Joke provide disruption, while cards like Burst Lightning and Thundering Falls offer removal options. The deck's strategy is to maintain control of the game while slowly chipping away at the opponent's resources and eventually securing victory.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on flooding the board with low-cost creatures and quickly overwhelming your opponent with a combination of aggression and resilience. By utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit to establish early board presence, and cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Sage of the Skies for late-game power, this deck aims to apply constant pressure on your opponent. Additionally, cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Seam Rip provide you with ways to protect your creatures and disrupt your opponent's game plan, ensuring that you can maintain your aggressive strategy throughout the match.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and combat tricks. By utilizing low-cost and high-power creatures like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo, as well as cards like Bushwhack and Mightform Harmonizer to pump up the team, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain momentum throughout the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Escape Tunnel and Esper Origins provide ways to protect and enhance the creatures on the battlefield, ensuring a steady stream of threats for the opponent to deal with.

The main idea of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and powerful enchantments. By utilizing cards like Sage of the Skies and Gene Pollinator, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence while using cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Brightglass Gearhulk to protect its key creatures. By maintaining a balance of aggression and defense, the deck seeks to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield and apply pressure to the opponent, ultimately leading to a swift victory.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on using counterspells, removal, and card advantage to control the game and outvalue the opponent. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Spell Snare and Impractical Joke, while maintaining card advantage with Opt and Sleight of Hand. Hearth Elemental and Sunderflock provide win conditions, while Eddymurk Crab and Flow State help with stalling the game. The deck also includes some burn spells like Burst Lightning for additional removal options. Overall, the deck aims to control the board and outlast the opponent until it can secure a victory.

The key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with quick, low-cost spells and creatures in order to deal damage quickly and efficiently. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Slickshot Show-Off, and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to control the board and push through damage quickly. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Impractical Joke add versatility and disruption, while cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help to ensure card draw and consistency. Overall, the deck is focused on a fast-paced, aggressive playstyle to outpace the opponent and secure a victory.

The main concept of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Temple Garden, while also generating value through cards like Keen-Eyed Curator and Sage of the Skies. The deck focuses on aggressive plays using creatures like Pawpatch Recruit and Badgermole Cub to pressure the opponent early on. Cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Hushwood Verge provide additional utility and support for the aggro game plan. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast start and efficient creature-based threats.

The primary strategy of this UR Aggro deck is to constantly apply pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. The deck focuses on tempo and card advantage, utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand to efficiently control the board while maintaining a quick pace of play. With a mix of cheap creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and spells like Burst Lightning, the deck aims to establish early dominance and close out the game swiftly before the opponent can stabilize. By combining aggression with disruptive spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing fast, aggressive creatures to overwhelm the opponent and push for quick victories. By ramping up with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, the deck can bring out powerful threats like Mossborn Hydra and Mightform Harmonizer early in the game. Cards like Ba Sing Se and Earthbender Ascension provide additional support and protection for the creatures, while Escape Tunnel allows for evasion and surprise attacks. The overall strategy is to build a strong board presence quickly and maintain pressure on the opponent throughout the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bring them back onto the battlefield for a devastating combo. Utilizing cards like Gloomlake Verge, Requiting Hex, and Restless Reef to facilitate the reanimation process, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of resurrected creatures such as Doomsday Excruciator and Superior Spider-Man. The deck also includes disruption spells like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up to control the opponent's actions, while providing additional support through cards like Emeritus of Ideation and Intimidation Tactics.

This deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back to the battlefield for quick and devastating attacks. By using a combination of cards that allow for discard, search, and reanimation, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with strong creatures and combo plays. Key cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex provide the power needed to close out games, while cards like Duress and Strategic Betrayal disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes some control elements and card draw to maintain its tempo and advantage.

The main focus of this Golgari Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's plays while building up its own resources. The deck aims to use cards like Duress and Maelstrom Pulse to strip the opponent's hand and board of threats, while using cards like Emeritus of Abundance and Keen-Eyed Curator to generate card advantage. The deck also includes removal spells like Requiting Hex and Witherbloom Charm to deal with any threats that do manage to hit the board. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue the opponent and grind out a win through attrition.
